tests.name: test_outputs.py::test_implication_accuracy

judge_scores = {'action_correctness': 5, 'implication_accuracy': 2, 'rationale': "The agent correctly recommends 50% dose reduction w...d states 50-75% DPD activity when CPIC specifies 30-70% activity for this genotype.", 'recommendation_completeness': 5}

    def test_implication_accuracy(judge_scores):
        """LLM judge: is the stated implication correct for this genotype?"""
        score = judge_scores["implication_accuracy"]
>       assert score >= 4, (
            f"Implication accuracy {score}/5 (need >= 4). "
            f"Rationale: {judge_scores.get('rationale', '')}"
